name: okto-pulse
description: Turnkey Pulse SDLC orchestration in Claude Code: bootstrap, MCP wiring, stage-specialized subagents, hooks, and stress-test.

pulse_deploy_mode.title: Pulse deploy mode
pulse_deploy_mode.description: How Pulse runs: local-pip, docker, or remote.

pulse_mcp_url.title: Pulse MCP URL
pulse_mcp_url.description: Full MCP URL including ?api_key= param. Set automatically by /okto-pulse:setup.

pulse_api_token.title: Pulse API token
pulse_api_token.description: API token for the Pulse MCP. Required for all deploy modes.

pulse_board_id.title: Active Pulse board id
pulse_board_id.description: Default board for stage skills. Set during /okto-pulse:setup.

pulse_stress_board_id.title: Stress-test board id
pulse_stress_board_id.description: Pinned board used exclusively by /okto-pulse:stress-test. Set once; never changes.
